description: Justin Bons discusses his evolving perspective on Solana, highlighting the importance of changing one's mind in the cryptocurrency space. He emphasizes a long-term value investing approach, focusing on fundamental questions in blockchain technology and the need for a contrarian viewpoint.
topic_summary: In this episode, Justin Bons reflects on his past criticisms of Solana and shares insights into his investment philosophy, which prioritizes long-term value and critical analysis of blockchain fundamentals. He discusses the challenges and opportunities in the cryptocurrency market, advocating for a thoughtful approach to investment.
